title: Personal Assistant / Executive Assistant – Virtual
job_description:
Summary of The Role  The Personal Assistant/ Executive Assistant - Virtual, will be responsible for providing comprehensive support to the [CEO, Director, etc.], managing office systems and supervising staff. This role requires exceptional organizational skills, the ability to handle confidential information, and the capacity to manage multiple tasks simultaneously. Role Responsibilities 
  • Providing a day to day assistance and support to the CEO; coordinating correspondence, proactive/accurate management of diaries, video conferencing and other calls, emails, arranging, tracking, and monitoring meeting actions.
  • Managing tasks assigned by the CEO to his team members and ensuring completion by following up with team members.
  • Create posts using Canva or similar platform and share on social media management for CEO when required (usually we preprogram using Hootsuite).
  • Organizing and attending Directors Meetings, to include preparation of agendas and other documentation to support these meetings.
  • Provide administrative support across various Strategic Projects to the Directors monitoring workstreams deliverables.
  • Playing a key role in providing input to business decisions offering an impartial sounding board with a great understanding of all the departments and how they interact with one another.
  • Travel research, trouble arrangements, itinerary preparation, air tickets and train tickets reservation.
  • Ability to translate business requirements and prioritize activities to support the Directors in meeting their business objectives.
  • Collating monthly reports and other strategic information required by the Directors.
  • Own all travel management; coordinating and booking international travel requirements to include trains, flights, cars, and accommodation for the CEO.
  • Preparing reports, presentations and data analysis.
  • Ad-hoc administrative support to the company secretarial team as required.
job_requirements:
Essential Skills, Knowledge & Experience 
  • Degree in Business Management, Human Resources or relevant field.
  • Minimum 3 - 5 years of experience Training as a secretary.
  • Previous work experience in the UAE is an added advantage.
  • Experience with using Asana, Canva, Accounting systems such as Xero, Excel, Gmail, Google, Google Suite, Drive.
  • Experience on these specifically google travels, air BNB, Booking.com.
  • Basic knowledge of Hootsuite and Canva and Instagram.
  • Proven admin experience Excellent communication skills, fluency in English, professional and friendly phone etiquette.
  • Exemplary planning and time management skills.
  • Exceptional organizational and multitasking skills.
  • Ability to work well under pressure and meet deadlines.
Personal Attributes 
  • Must be accountable with a strong work ethic, a sense of urgency and ownership, and be able to work effectively both independently and as part of a team. 
  • Data driven, highly organized, and detailed oriented. 
  • Able to deliver as efficiently as possible without compromising quality or the customer experience. 
  • First class communicator with an ability to engage sales teams, operational teams and customer stakeholders up to a senior level with confidence. 
  • Efficient in approach, developing optimized and simple working methods and processes with a keen eye for detail. 
  • Continually improving, caring about quality, and delivering customer value.
job_benefits:
Work Environment 
  • General Work Hours: 45 hours a week with mandatory weekend availability when needed
  • Remuneration: Gross Salary Up to LKR 200,000
  • Location: Remote WFH + Occasional Meets at our Colombo 5 office – Sri Lanka
  • Benefits: Paid leave, career upskilling opportunities, eLearning courses

title: Junior Data Analyst
job_description:
Summary of The Role  The Junior Data Analyst will be responsible for the accurate collection, input, and maintenance of data across various platforms and databases. This role involves ensuring data integrity, generating reports, managing data security, and supporting departments in their data needs. The ideal candidate will possess excellent organizational and analytical skills, attention to detail, and the ability to handle large datasets efficiently.  Role Responsibilities 
  • Enter, update, and maintain accurate data in company databases and systems. 
  • Act as a point of contact for employees with data-related inquiries or issues. 
  • Ensure data integrity and consistency by regularly cleaning and validating data. 
  • Manage the company’s databases and ensure they are running smoothly. 
  • Regularly back up databases to prevent data loss. 
  • Perform data validation and audits to ensure data accuracy. 
  • Provide data analysis to support decision-making in various departments. 
  • Generate routine and ad hoc reports based on the company’s data needs.
job_requirements:
Essential Skills, Knowledge & Experience 
  • Degree in Business Management, Data Science or equivalent. 
  • Minimum 2 – 3 years’ experience. 
  • Proficient in data management software and tools (e.g., Excel, Access, SQL).
  • Knowledge of power queries and powerbi would be advantageous.  
  • Strong attention to detail and accuracy. 
  • Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills. 
  • Ability to work independently and handle multiple tasks simultaneously. 
  • Knowledge of data protection regulations and security protocols.  
  • Ability to handle ambiguity in a fast-paced environment with multiple concurrent tasks and changing priorities. 
Personal Attributes 
  • Must be accountable with a strong work ethic, a sense of urgency and ownership, and be able to work effectively both independently and as part of a team. 
  • Data driven, highly organized, and detailed oriented. 
  • Able to deliver as efficiently as possible without compromising quality or the customer experience. 
  • First class communicator with an ability to engage sales teams, operational teams and customer stakeholders up to a senior level with confidence. 
  • Efficient in approach, developing optimized and simple working methods and processes with a keen eye for detail. 
  • Continually improving, caring about quality, and delivering customer value.
job_benefits:
Work Environment 
  • General Work Hours: 1.30PM – 10.30PM (WFH) Sri Lanka Time – 45hrs/week
  • Remuneration: Gross Salary Up to LKR 150,000
  • Location: Remote WFH + Occasional Meets at our Colombo 5 office – Sri Lanka
  • Benefits: Paid leave, career upskilling opportunities, eLearning courses

title: Bookkeeper
job_description:
Role Responsibilities 
  • Maintain an accurate record of financial transactions.
  • Reconciliation of entries into the accounting system.
  • Preparation of management accounts and reports.
  • Preparation of both company and personal tax computations and returns.
  • Recording of debits and credits.
  • Maintain the trial balance, by a reconciliation of general ledgers.
  • Account reconciliation to assert the accuracy of transactions.
  • Use knowledge of local laws to comply with reporting requirements.
  • Monitor any variances from the projected budget.
job_requirements:
Essential Skills, Knowledge & Experience
  • Degree in Accounting or Finance or partly qualified in CA/ CIMA/ ACCA equivalent
  • Minimum 4 – 5 years’ experience in similar capacity
  • Hands on experience working with Xero online accounting software is a MUST
  • Experience in UK finance or accounting is mandatory
  • Accounts and tax return preparation using Accounts Production, Personal Tax, Business Tax – IRIS software experience is desirable
  • Sound knowledge in Microsoft Excel
  • Strong attention to details and high level of accuracy
  • Ability to possess a good command of English and a positive approach towards working as a team
  • Problem solving skills and quick-thinking approach
  • Sense of accountability and responsibility towards your work
Personal Attributes
  • Must be accountable with a strong work ethic, a sense of urgency and ownership, and be able to work effectively both independently and as part of a team
  • Data driven, highly organized, and detailed oriented
  • Able to deliver as efficiently as possible without compromising quality or the customer experience
  • First class communicator with an ability to engage internal and customer stakeholders up to a senior level with confidence.
  • Efficient in approach, developing optimized and simple working methods and processes with a keen eye for detail
  • Continually improving, caring about quality, and delivering customer value
job_benefits:
Work Environment 
  • General Work Hours: 1.30PM – 10.30PM (WFH) Sri Lanka Time – 45hrs/week.
  • Remuneration: Gross Salary Up to LKR 175,000/-.
  • Location: Remote WFH + Occasional Meets at our Colombo 5 office – Sri Lanka.
  • Benefits: Paid leave, career upskilling opportunities, eLearning courses.

title: Finance Executive – Accounts Receivable
job_description:
Summary of The Role
The Finance Executive - Accounts Receivable is responsible for managing the company’s accounts receivable process, ensuring timely collection of payments from clients and maintaining accurate records of all transactions. This role involves working closely with the sales and customer service teams to resolve any billing issues, overseeing credit control functions, and preparing regular reports on receivables. The Finance Executive plays a key role in maintaining the company’s cash flow and ensuring financial stability by managing outstanding invoices and minimizing overdue accounts.
Role Responsibilities
  • Monitor and manage the accounts receivable ledger to ensure timely collection of outstanding invoices.
  • Follow up with clients on overdue payments, resolving any discrepancies or issues related to billing.
  • Prepare and send regular statements and reminders to clients regarding their account balances.
  • Implement and maintain credit control procedures to minimize overdue accounts and bad debts.
  • Prepare regular reports on accounts receivable status, aging analysis, and collection performance.
  • Ensure all accounts receivable activities comply with company policies and relevant regulations.
  • Maintain accurate and up-to-date records of all receivables transactions and client communications.
  • Attend to the office maintenance and related matters.
  • Ensure all accounting activities and internal audits comply with financial regulations.​
  • Support other finance team members in the day-to-day running of the finance department.
job_requirements:
Essential Skills, Knowledge & Experience
  • Degree in Accounting or Finance.
  • CA / CIMA / ACCA partially equivalent.
  • Minimum 2 – 3 years’ experience in similar capacity.
  • Understanding of the basic principles of finance, accounting, and bookkeeping.
  • Knowledge of double entry accounting.
  • Prior experience working in accounts (payable or receivable) preferred.
  • Proficient MS Excel skills (Vlookups, Pivot Tables, SumIf formulas etc.) and experienced in core MS office packages.
  • Ability to possess a good command of English and a positive approach towards working as a team.
  • Problem solving skills and quick-thinking approach.
  • Sense of accountability and responsibility towards your work.
Personal Attributes
  • Must be accountable with a strong work ethic, a sense of urgency and ownership, and be able to work effectively both independently and as part of a team.
  • Data driven, highly organized, and detailed oriented.
  • Able to deliver as efficiently as possible without compromising quality or the customer experience.
  • First class communicator with an ability to engage internal and customer stakeholders up to a senior level with confidence.
  • Efficient in approach, developing optimized and simple working methods and processes with a keen eye for detail.
  • Continually improving, caring about quality, and delivering customer value.
job_benefits:
Work Environment
  • General Work Hours: 9.00AM to 6.00PM Sri Lanka Time – 45hrs/week.​
  • Location: Hybrid. 2 days work from Colombo 5 office and 3 days WFH.​
  • Remuneration: Gross Salary Up to LKR 150,000/-.
  • Benefits: Paid leave, career upskilling opportunities, eLearning courses.

title: Customer Support Executive
job_description:
Summary of The Role  The Customer Support Executive plays a crucial role in maintaining and enhancing customer satisfaction and loyalty by providing high-quality service and support. They act as the primary point of contact for customers, addressing inquiries, resolving issues, and offering guidance on products and services. This position requires excellent communication skills, a customercentric attitude, and the ability to troubleshoot and resolve problems efficiently.  Role Responsibilities 
  • Handle a high volume of inbound and outbound calls.
  • Handle customer queries and complaints received via Email, WhatsApp and telephone and general inquires.
  • Communicate with the team and follow the agreed business processes.
  • Work with a team of representatives offering customer support.
  • Has a good understanding of processes and can follow through and escalate when required.
  • Resolving customer complaints brought to your attention within an agreed timeline.
  • Can give constructive feedback on process improvement.
  • Conducting quality assurance surveys with customers and providing a summary of those to the customer care manager.
  • Willing to learn fast about the services offered to enhance customer support.
  • Maintaining a pleasant working relationship with your team.
job_requirements:
Essential Skills, Knowledge & Experience 
  • Degree in Customer Service, Medical Administration or relevant field preferred (Optional).
  • Minimum 2 – 3 years’ experience in same or similar role.
  • Health Industry related experience is preferred working in hospitals.
  • Experience with CRM Systems: Proficiency in CRM platforms like HubSpot and Salesforce.
  • Roster Management: Capability to effectively manage team schedules to ensure comprehensive coverage.
  • Customer Service Excellence: Strong background in customer service, especially in handling complex issues and complaints.
  • Communication and Leadership: Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with proven leadership capabilities.
  • Analytical and Organizational Skills: Ability to analyze data for decisionmaking, prioritize tasks, and manage time effectively.
  • Healthcare Industry Knowledge: Understanding of healthcare systems and experience in a healthcare or customer-focused environment is highly desirable.
Personal Attributes 
  • Must be accountable with a strong work ethic, a sense of urgency and ownership, and be able to work effectively both independently and as part of a team. 
  • Data driven, highly organized, and detailed oriented. 
  • Able to deliver as efficiently as possible without compromising quality or the customer experience. 
  • First class communicator with an ability to engage sales teams, operational teams and customer stakeholders up to a senior level with confidence. 
  • Efficient in approach, developing optimized and simple working methods and processes with a keen eye for detail. 
  • Continually improving, caring about quality, and delivering customer value.
job_benefits:
Work Environment
  • General Work Hours: Full Time - 45 hours a week (Roster Basis).​
  • Remuneration: Gross salary up to LKR 110,000 to LKR 125,000/-.
  • Location: Hybrid (Requires to come to office once a week) + WFH – Sri Lanka.​
  • Benefits: Paid leave, career upskilling opportunities, eLearning courses.

title: Creative Designer
job_description:
Job Summary The Creative Designer specializing in graphics and video editing will be responsible for crafting visually compelling designs and video content that align with our brand identity and engage our target audience. The ideal candidate combines artistic creativity with technical expertise, staying updated with the latest design and video editing trends to deliver high-quality, impactful visuals across various platforms. Role Responsibilities 
  • Create and edit videos for social media platforms (YouTube shots, Instagram reels & longer videos)
  • Content creation.
  • Create graphics for social media channels.
  • Video animation.
  • Maintain a library of photographs, videos, and other multimedia assets to ensure that they are properly catalogued and organized.
  • Present of design ideas and concepts to internal stakeholders.
job_requirements:
Essential Skills, Knowledge & Experience 
  • Degree in Design, Multimedia Design, Digital Marketing or related field.
  • Minimum 2 - 4 years of experience.
  • Using design tools like Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro & Photoshop.
  • Knowledge in colour grading, enhancing visuals, editing to music.
  • A portfolio that demonstrates a variety of design projects, showcasing both creative thinking and technical expertise is a must.
  • Exceptional written and verbal communication skills and exposure to client-facing projects.
Personal Attributes 
  • Must be accountable with a strong work ethic, a sense of urgency and ownership, and be able to work effectively both independently and as part of a team. 
  • Data driven, highly organized, and detailed oriented.

title: Finance Manager and FP&A Analyst
job_description:
Job Summary The Finance Manager and FP&A Analyst to lead financial planning and analysis activities while managing the overall financial operations of our organization. In this hybrid role, you will be responsible for budgeting, forecasting, financial reporting, and providing actionable insights to drive strategic decisions. The ideal candidate will have strong analytical skills, experience in financial management, and the ability to align financial strategies with organizational goals. This position requires a hands-on approach, strategic thinking, and a passion for optimizing financial performance. Role Responsibilities 
  • Oversee day-to-day financial operations, including accounts payable, accounts receivable, payroll, and general ledger activities.
  • Manage cash flow, working capital, and liquidity to ensure the financial stability of the organization.
  • Lead FP&A support for business leaders within the Finance department and organization.
  • Contribute to forecast, budget and long-range planning cycles, including enhancing the company’s corporate model and coordinating with stakeholders on assumptions & inputs.
  • Build detailed financial, scenario-based models to evaluate investment priorities and evaluate potential alternatives.
  • Ensure accuracy and timeliness of financial reporting in compliance with accounting standards and regulations.
  • Develop and implement financial policies, procedures, and controls to safeguard company assets.
  • Assist in the preparation of financial reports, budgets, and forecasts.
  • Build analysis and presentation of strategic materials for important management meetings.
  • Assist with management, Board business, and financial planning, including presentations and key analysis requests.
  • Support other finance team members in the day-to-day running of the finance department.
job_requirements:
Essential Skills, Knowledge & Experience
  • Degree in Accounting or Finance or qualified in CA/ CIMA/ ACCA equivalent
  • Minimum 4 – 5 years’ experience in similar capacity
  • Hands on experience working with Xero online accounting software is a MUST
  • Experience with financial statement analysis and a knowledge of corporate finance concepts
  • Experience in UK finance or accounting is mandatory
  • Sound knowledge in Microsoft Excel
  • Strong attention to details and high level of accuracy
  • Ability to possess a good command of English and a positive approach towards working as a team
  • Problem solving skills and quick-thinking approach
  • Sense of accountability and responsibility towards your work
Personal Attributes
  • Must be accountable with a strong work ethic, a sense of urgency and ownership, and be able to work effectively both independently and as part of a team
  • Data driven, highly organized, and detailed oriented
  • Able to deliver as efficiently as possible without compromising quality or the customer experience
  • First class communicator with an ability to engage internal and customer stakeholders up to a senior level with confidence.
  • Efficient in approach, developing optimized and simple working methods and processes with a keen eye for detail
  • Continually improving, caring about quality, and delivering customer value
job_benefits:
Work Environment 
  • General Work Hours: 1.30PM – 10.30PM (WFH) Sri Lanka Time – 45hrs/week.
  • Remuneration: Gross Salary Up to LKR 300,000/-.
  • Location: Remote WFH + Occasional Meets at our Colombo 5 office – Sri Lanka.

title: Head of Software Engineering
job_description:
Summary of The Role  The Head of Software Engineering to join our technology team and help drive our digital transformation. You will be instrumental in developing and maintaining our enterprise healthcare platform that supports our extensive network of medical professionals and serves thousands of patients across the UK. Role Responsibilities 
  • Develop and maintain 120+ system components including admin applications, allocator systems, and integrations.
  • Design and implement database structures using PostgreSQL.
  • Contribute to system architecture decisions and technical documentation.
  • Work with complex booking systems and healthcare-related APIs.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software solutions.
  • Participate in code reviews and maintain coding standards.
  • Support and enhance existing healthcare platform components.
  • Help integrate our e-prescription service with 3,500+ pharmacies.
  • Support our telemedicine platform development.
job_requirements:
Non-Negotiable Skills for Screening: 
  • English language skills at CEFR C1 or above
  • Experience in implementing algorithms to solve complex business use cases like multi constraint optimization, recommendations etc.
  • Have managed other developers and led mid to large teams in building enterprise software.
Essential Skills, Knowledge & Experience 
  • 10+ years of experience as Tech Lead / Head of Software Engineering
  • 6+ years of custom development experience
  • Deep knowledge of Java Core and Java Enterprise
  • Expert-level proficiency in Spring Framework
  • Strong understanding of Object-Oriented Programming principles
  • Advanced knowledge of PostgreSQL and database optimization
  • Proficiency with Git, Gradle, and TeamCity
  • Experience with system design and API integrations
  • Basic algorithmic skills for resource allocation systems
Additional Requirements
  • Experience with or willingness to learn Cuba Platform
  • Understanding of RESTful API design and implementation
  • Knowledge of healthcare systems is a plus
  • Experience with microservices architecture
  • Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines
Personal Attributes 
  • Must be accountable with a strong work ethic, a sense of urgency and ownership, and be able to work effectively both independently and as part of a team. 
  • Data driven, highly organized, and detailed oriented. 
  • Able to deliver as efficiently as possible without compromising quality or the customer experience. 
  • First class communicator with an ability to engage sales teams, operational teams and customer stakeholders up to a senior level with confidence. 
  • Efficient in approach, developing optimized and simple working methods and processes with a keen eye for detail. 
  • Continually improving, caring about quality, and delivering customer value.
job_benefits:
Work Environment 
  • General Work Hours: 1.30PM – 10.30PM (WFH) Sri Lanka Time – 45hrs/week
  • Remuneration: Gross Salary Up to USD 4,000
  • Location: Remote WFH + Occasional Meets at our Colombo 5 office – Sri Lanka
  • Benefits: Paid leave, career upskilling opportunities, eLearning courses
